signals.headline: Lakers Take 2-0 Series Lead Over Rockets Despite Missing Star Players | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
Lakers Take 2-0 Series Lead Over Rockets Despite Missing Star Players | YES | HIGH confidence**

The Los Angeles Lakers have secured a 2-0 series lead against the Houston Rockets in their first-round playoff matchup[2][4]. This is significant because the Lakers achieved this while missing Austin Reaves and Luka Doncic, their two leading scorers[2]. LeBron James contributed 19 points and 13 assists

signals.headline: Cavaliers Lead Raptors 2-0 in First Round | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
Cavaliers Lead Raptors 2-0 in First Round | YES | HIGH confidence**

The Cleveland Cavaliers defeated the Toronto Raptors 115-105 on April 21, 2026, extending their series lead to 2-0[1]. Donovan Mitchell led the effort with 30 points, 7 rebounds, and 5 assists, while James Harden added 28 points[1]. Scottie Barnes led the Raptors with 26 points in the losing effort[1].
